key.name: gtk3-dark-theme
key.description: The GTK3 theme for dark mode. Empty falls back to Adwaita-dark.

key.name: gtk3-light-theme
key.description: The GTK3 theme for light mode. Empty resets to system default.

key.name: manage-icon-theme
key.description: Whether to switch the icon theme with the color scheme.

key.name: icon-dark-theme
key.description: Icon theme for dark mode. Empty means do not change.

key.name: icon-light-theme
key.description: Icon theme for light mode. Empty means do not change.

key.name: manage-kvantum-theme
key.description: Whether to switch the Kvantum (Qt) theme with the color scheme.

key.name: kvantum-dark-theme
key.description: Kvantum theme for dark mode. Empty means do not change.

key.name: kvantum-light-theme
key.description: Kvantum theme for light mode. Empty means do not change.

key.name: manage-wallpaper
key.description: Whether to switch the desktop wallpaper with the color scheme.

key.name: wallpaper-dark-uri
key.description: File URI of the wallpaper for dark mode. Empty means do not change.

key.name: wallpaper-light-uri
key.description: File URI of the wallpaper for light mode. Empty means do not change.
